creator: dbaio@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 174369
pecl-svn-1.0.3-1.patch

- Add USE_CSTD=c99 to fix building on 9.3
- Take maintainer'ship
- Upgrade subversion port
    Changelog from pecl-svn 1.0.3 shows that subversion 1.9 is now supported:
      Compiles with libsvn 1.9
      #71025 - support for subversion 1.9 by pterjan at google dot com
- Add a missing LIB devel/apr1 (qa)

portlint: OK (looks fine.)
testport: 
	poudriere: i386,  9.3   (OK)
	poudriere: amd64, 9.3   (OK)
	poudriere: i386,  10.3  (OK)
	poudriere: amd64, 10.3  (OK)
	poudriere: i386,  12    (OK)
	poudriere: amd64, 12    (OK)
